# Sub PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 57.495 Hz Gain -9.000 dB Q 2.7755
  biquad b0=0.999266568688 b1=-1.99771230776 b2=0.998459883474 a1=-1.99771230776 a2=0.997726452162
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 30.395 Hz Gain -5.320 dB Q 0.7990
  biquad b0=0.999226918617 b1=-1.99661994232 b2=0.997396974657 a1=-1.99661994232 a2=0.996623893274

  biquad b0=1.00034827938 b1=-1.99826258491 b2=0.99796324701 a1=-1.99826258491 a2=0.998311526389

  biquad b0=1.00025907115 b1=-1.99853791443 b2=0.998391000432 a1=-1.99853791443 a2=0.998650071581

  biquad b0=0.999808208021 b1=-1.99885634673 b2=0.999076181483 a1=-1.99885634673 a2=0.998884389504
